retry_reason: Failure from the bindcnt check is a permanent condition (action still bound), and the put operation itself does not have transient errors; retrying will not change the outcome.
contract_summary: This function releases a reference on a tc_action, potentially deleting it when the reference count reaches zero. It enforces a constraint in strict mode: when bind is false and strict is true, it refuses to release if the action has any binders (tcfa_bindcnt > 0). The caller must ensure that the action pointer is valid or NULL. After calling, if the return value is ACT_P_DELETED, the action has been freed and the pointer must not be used. The caller is responsible for checking the return value to handle the deleted case appropriately.
